//: Type-checks the plain-JS sources via JSDoc. No build step: noEmit is on, nothing is compiled or shipped. Run with `npm run typecheck` (tsc --noEmit).
//exclude: Browser glue is not type-checked, same as the index.html inline script: src/account.js and src/forum.js use DOM + cross-file script globals (window.supabase, config vars, account.js's _sb) that this Node-lib/script-global config can't resolve, and src/vendor/** is a minified third-party bundle. src/ui-common.js is the same kind of DOM-only browser glue (theme <html> classes, localStorage, money/esc formatting) shared by index.html and KitBuilder/index.html via a classic <script> tag. src/page-shell.js deliberately is NOT excluded: its DOM mount reaches the document through globalThis (the src/compat-bmx.js browser-path idiom) precisely so its pure legal-link builders stay type-checked here. tools/** are Node CLI scripts (verify-job.js, drift-check.js) working with dynamic external data (fetched HTML, JSON state) — same non-goal as verify-job.js was never in scope. The pure logic (compat/schema/validate) + tests remain fully checked.
